node._create_table_statement: CREATE TABLE `cron_state` ( `cron_state_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `job` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `status` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown', `host` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL, `pid` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `started_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `finished_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `last_success` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `duration_ms` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `consecutive_failures` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `last_output_tail` varchar(2048) DEFAULT NULL, `heartbeat` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`cron_state_id`), UNIQUE KEY `job` (`job`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
node.title: cron_state
